# JMN Parts (PT. Jaya Makmur Nugraha)

> Authorized Suzuki Genuine Parts distributor in Indonesia, exporting OEM auto
> parts worldwide. Also supplies Toyota, Daihatsu, and Mitsubishi parts.

JMN Parts (PT. Jaya Makmur Nugraha) is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. We sell
and export genuine OEM spare parts for Suzuki (APV, New Carry, All New
Ertiga, XL7) as well as Toyota, Daihatsu, and Mitsubishi vehicles.

## What we do

- Distribute Suzuki Genuine Parts as an authorized channel in Indonesia
- Export spare parts internationally (Middle East, Africa, Southeast Asia)
- Support Incoterms: FOB, CIF, DAP
- Provide export documentation: Proforma Invoice, Packing List, Certificate
  of Origin, HS Code classification
- Ship via air and sea freight (LCL/FCL)
- Buyers can request quotes by part number, vehicle model, or category

## How to buy or request an export quote

Contact via WhatsApp or the contact form at https://jmnautoparts.com/contact
with the required part numbers (OEM if known), vehicle model/year, target
quantities, destination port, and preferred Incoterms.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://jmnautoparts.com
- Product catalog: https://jmnautoparts.com/products
- Contact / request a quote: https://jmnautoparts.com/contact

## Contact

- Email: jaya_makmur_nugraha@yahoo.com

- Address: Jl. Karang Anyar Permai 55 Blok C1.4, Jakarta, Indonesia
